markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Align on content strategy and review the first AI-generated calibration blog post.](https://fathom.video/share/tfLNiv8TQKLtAkynxys8ytdFufe-Vxng?tab=summary&timestamp=418.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Primary Goal:** Correct AI search results (e.g., "Fleet is not an MDM") by publishing fresh, authoritative content.](https://fathom.video/share/tfLNiv8TQKLtAkynxys8ytdFufe-Vxng?tab=summary&timestamp=1488.0)
  - [**Content Strategy:** Pivot from product-centric topics to SEO-driven keywords to improve search visibility.](https://fathom.video/share/tfLNiv8TQKLtAkynxys8ytdFufe-Vxng?tab=summary&timestamp=741.0)
  - [**Phase 2:** Launch a programmatic SEO project for 335 osquery data tables to create a massive, differentiated content library.](https://fathom.video/share/tfLNiv8TQKLtAkynxys8ytdFufe-Vxng?tab=summary&timestamp=1037.0)
  - [**Action:** Sam will grant GrowthX and John Google Search Console access to enable performance tracking.](https://fathom.video/share/tfLNiv8TQKLtAkynxys8ytdFufe-Vxng?tab=summary&timestamp=1771.0)

## Topics

### The Problem: Inaccurate AI Search Results

  - [The project's primary objective is to correct outdated and inaccurate information in AI search results.](https://fathom.video/share/tfLNiv8TQKLtAkynxys8ytdFufe-Vxng?tab=summary&timestamp=1488.0)
  - [**Example:** A prospect's AI comparison of Jamf vs. Fleet falsely stated, "Fleet is not an MDM."](https://fathom.video/share/tfLNiv8TQKLtAkynxys8ytdFufe-Vxng?tab=summary&timestamp=1524.0)
  - [**Root Cause:** AI models misinterpret Fleet's nuanced capabilities, such as its ability to be used *alongside* another MDM.](https://fathom.video/share/tfLNiv8TQKLtAkynxys8ytdFufe-Vxng?tab=summary&timestamp=2575.0)
  - [**Solution:** Publish fresh, authoritative content to update AI models with accurate information.](https://fathom.video/share/tfLNiv8TQKLtAkynxys8ytdFufe-Vxng?tab=summary&timestamp=1508.0)

### Content Strategy & Prioritization

  - [**Airtable Topics:** Brock has reviewed \~20 of 79 topics, approving \>10.](https://fathom.video/share/tfLNiv8TQKLtAkynxys8ytdFufe-Vxng?tab=summary&timestamp=570.0)
      - [**Rationale for Rejection:** Avoiding competition with official docs and reproducing generic content (e.g., "resetting a device to factory default").](https://fathom.video/share/tfLNiv8TQKLtAkynxys8ytdFufe-Vxng?tab=summary&timestamp=663.0)
  - [**SEO Alignment:** The initial list of topics is too product-centric for high SEO ranking.](https://fathom.video/share/tfLNiv8TQKLtAkynxys8ytdFufe-Vxng?tab=summary&timestamp=741.0)
      - [**Solution:** Repurpose topics with SEO-friendly titles (e.g., "Manage Android devices") and include product details in H2s or body text.](https://fathom.video/share/tfLNiv8TQKLtAkynxys8ytdFufe-Vxng?tab=summary&timestamp=915.0)
  - [**Phase 2: Programmatic SEO for osquery Data Tables**](https://fathom.video/share/tfLNiv8TQKLtAkynxys8ytdFufe-Vxng?tab=summary&timestamp=1037.0)
      - [**Opportunity:** Create a blog post for each of Fleet's 335 osquery data tables.](https://fathom.video/share/tfLNiv8TQKLtAkynxys8ytdFufe-Vxng?tab=summary&timestamp=1037.0)
      - [**Benefit:** This project would create a massive, differentiated content library that highlights a unique product feature.](https://fathom.video/share/tfLNiv8TQKLtAkynxys8ytdFufe-Vxng?tab=summary&timestamp=1137.0)
      - [**Execution:** A programmatic SEO approach will be used, generating pages from a template.](https://fathom.video/share/tfLNiv8TQKLtAkynxys8ytdFufe-Vxng?tab=summary&timestamp=1168.0)

### Calibration Blog Review

  - [**Purpose:** Align on writing voice and style.](https://fathom.video/share/tfLNiv8TQKLtAkynxys8ytdFufe-Vxng?tab=summary&timestamp=434.0)
  - [**Feedback:** The draft is authoritative and deep, which is critical for AI visibility.](https://fathom.video/share/tfLNiv8TQKLtAkynxys8ytdFufe-Vxng?tab=summary&timestamp=1606.0)
      - [**John:** Superficial posts fail with AI; deep content is essential.](https://fathom.video/share/tfLNiv8TQKLtAkynxys8ytdFufe-Vxng?tab=summary&timestamp=1606.0)
      - [**Brock:** Content must be factually accurate to build trust.](https://fathom.video/share/tfLNiv8TQKLtAkynxys8ytdFufe-Vxng?tab=summary&timestamp=2221.0)
  - [**Feature Image:** The AI-generated image successfully captures the Fleet brand aesthetic.](https://fathom.video/share/tfLNiv8TQKLtAkynxys8ytdFufe-Vxng?tab=summary&timestamp=1309.0)
      - [**Next Step:** Irena will get final approval from Mike T.](https://fathom.video/share/tfLNiv8TQKLtAkynxys8ytdFufe-Vxng?tab=summary&timestamp=1668.0)

### Performance Measurement

  - [**Tool:** A Looker dashboard will track performance.](https://fathom.video/share/tfLNiv8TQKLtAkynxys8ytdFufe-Vxng?tab=summary&timestamp=1876.0)
  - [**Key Metric:** LLM referral traffic, showing which AI models are driving users to the site.](https://fathom.video/share/tfLNiv8TQKLtAkynxys8ytdFufe-Vxng?tab=summary&timestamp=1876.0)
  - [**Context:** John noted a trend at his previous company where AI summaries increased impressions but decreased clicks.](https://fathom.video/share/tfLNiv8TQKLtAkynxys8ytdFufe-Vxng?tab=summary&timestamp=1948.0)
      - [**Goal:** Use the dashboard to analyze this trend for Fleet.](https://fathom.video/share/tfLNiv8TQKLtAkynxys8ytdFufe-Vxng?tab=summary&timestamp=1948.0)
  - [**Access:** Google Search Console access is required to build the dashboard.](https://fathom.video/share/tfLNiv8TQKLtAkynxys8ytdFufe-Vxng?tab=summary&timestamp=1771.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Fleet Team:** Review the calibration blog in the Google Doc and tag GrowthX when complete.](https://fathom.video/share/tfLNiv8TQKLtAkynxys8ytdFufe-Vxng?tab=summary&timestamp=418.0)
  - [**Brock:**](https://fathom.video/share/tfLNiv8TQKLtAkynxys8ytdFufe-Vxng?tab=summary&timestamp=570.0)
      - [Approve at least 10 more Airtable topics for immediate production.](https://fathom.video/share/tfLNiv8TQKLtAkynxys8ytdFufe-Vxng?tab=summary&timestamp=629.0)
      - [Review the remaining Airtable topics, prioritizing quick approvals.](https://fathom.video/share/tfLNiv8TQKLtAkynxys8ytdFufe-Vxng?tab=summary&timestamp=727.0)
  - [**Irena:** Get final approval from Mike T. on the AI-generated feature image style.](https://fathom.video/share/tfLNiv8TQKLtAkynxys8ytdFufe-Vxng?tab=summary&timestamp=1668.0)
  - [**Sam:** Grant Google Search Console access to GrowthX and John.](https://fathom.video/share/tfLNiv8TQKLtAkynxys8ytdFufe-Vxng?tab=summary&timestamp=1771.0)
  - [**GrowthX:**](https://fathom.video/share/tfLNiv8TQKLtAkynxys8ytdFufe-Vxng?tab=summary&timestamp=1855.0)
      - [Analyze the Airtable topic list to identify SEO-aligned priorities.](https://fathom.video/share/tfLNiv8TQKLtAkynxys8ytdFufe-Vxng?tab=summary&timestamp=741.0)
      - [Draft 3 new articles based on approved topics for next week's review.](https://fathom.video/share/tfLNiv8TQKLtAkynxys8ytdFufe-Vxng?tab=summary&timestamp=1855.0)
